title: Open-data / license / donor-privacy triage gate (per source-block)
context: Every source-block feeding the catalog must pass an objective open-data/license/donor-privacy gate before any value is redistributed. This gate is the project's binding admission control: it encodes the cancer guardrails and produces an auditable PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact per source-block. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Define and document the open-data/license/donor-privacy triage gate plus the committed per-source-block PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact format.
acceptanceCriteria: Opens with the binding cancer guardrails: open-access-only; dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access categorically EXCLUDED; COSMIC/OncoKB link-only; no medical advice; provenance required.

Objective license criterion: a source-block PASSes only if permitsRedistribution: true is set from a cited clause/URL under the output license; missing/unparseable/NC/controlled = FLAG (link-only) or EXCLUDE - never default-allow.
Donor-privacy rule encoded: donor fields published-only; no enrichment, no external linkage, no re-identification; escalate unusually identifying records; reduce/omit on doubt.
Requires recording license id + URL + snapshot (committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL) per source-block.
Produces a committed PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact per source-block recording which checks ran.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: GATE.md (open-data/license/donor-privacy gate checklist) plus the per-source-block gate-artifact format, committed to the repo.
